subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and My leaf! His honour Jalál hath quaffed time and again from the chalice of reunion, and from the cup of meeting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و یا ورقتی جناب جلال که از کاس وصال مره بعد مره نوشیده و از قدح لقا
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @consolation and comfort, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @unity; oneness of humanity
